query:
SELECT 
  mi.name AS item_nome,
  ag.name AS grupo_nome,
  ag.id AS grupo_id,
  ao.name AS opcao_nome,
  ao.id AS opcao_id,
  ao.price AS preco_centavos
FROM menu_addon_groups ag
JOIN menu_addon_options ao ON ao.groupId = ag.id
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.id = ag.menuItemId
WHERE ag.isActive = 1 AND ao.isActive = 1
  AND ag.name LIKE '%uarni%'
ORDER BY mi.name, ag.name, ao.name;
